notes: 10 unlabelled user issues blocked by integrity policy (cannot read). Issue #259 is the CI caching proposal (needs manual PR creation with workflows permission). Latest release: 5.1.0 (April 26, 2026); 5.2.0 release PR #289 pending. dbrattli filed #290 (Builtins type refs) and created PR #291 to address it. This run created PR (branch: repo-assist/tests-builtins-coverage-2026-05-03) adding 15 tests for untested builtins. PR #291 adds bool/dict/list/pyInstanceof/pyNone - my tests (abs/chr/ord/len/map/str/int/float/isinstance/type/bytes) are complementary and don't conflict. Future stdlib candidates: functools.partial (needs design), io, socket.
